title: More Azaleas
description: Adds variants for flowering azalea leaves and bushes.
body:
# More Azaleas **Hi!** This pack adds a few variations to the Flowering Azalea Leaves and Bushes, so you can see flowers blooming more naturally! Also, all potted bushes have unique variants!
**Hope you like it!**
